text.title: System Design Process Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: Brief: 'launch order-tracking dashboard'. Phase 1: capture stakeholders + success. Phase 2: 100 DAU, 50 reads/sec, p95 200ms, 99.5% availability. Phase 3: C4 L1 + L2 + ADR for Postgres + ADR for Redis cache. Phase 4: capacity sanity (cap 250 RPS), anti-pattern scan (none), peer reviewer approves. Phase 5: package published.

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
